Trait_0.name: Elite Fore: Lord of the Corpse Hall
Trait_0.desc: This chracter cannot be Stunned and markers they have generated cannot be removed. Be sure to inform players of this before beginning the encounter.

Trait_1.name: Against Adversity
Trait_1.desc: Odin's Max HP is 125 per Enemy they are facing. If Odin is facing more than 4 enemies they perform one additional Primary Action.

Trait_2.name: Master of the Dread Arm
Trait_2.desc: Odin's [Zantetsuken] deals +2D6 damage if Odin is adjacent to a [Gungnir], consuming the [Gungnir] and causing the Unworthy enfeeblement to the target, which has the following effects: * An Unworthy character incurs a -2 penalty on all checks. * An Unworthy character has its speed reduced by 2. * An Unworthy character cannot wield a [Shard of Gungnir]. * Unworthy removes the Worthy enhancement. * Unworthy is removed when a character takes 10 or more damage from a single source, deals 10 or more damage in a single attack, or hals 10 or more HP in a single ability.

Trigger.desc: At the start of the encounter and each round, immediately before the [Adventurer Step] begins

Base Effect.desc: Odin prepares the following based on the round. Combining if overlapping: * The First Test (Round 1, 3, & 6) Immediately prepare Gungnir * The Second Test (Round 2, 4, & 6) Immediately prepare Eunherjar * The Third Test (3, 5, & 6) Immediately prepare Gagnrath * The Final Test (Round 7 or When Odin = 75 HP or less) Enter Phase 2 and Immagiately prepare Shit Zantetsuken
Attack using Zantetsuken , then immediately use Woden Valkut , Hall of Melancholy , Sanngetall .
Deal 10 Damage to the target and all its adjacent allies

Marker Area.desc: A stationary 6x6 area centered on the origin

Target.desc: All enemies within the marker area

Marker Trigger.desc: The beginning of this chracter's nect turn

Marker Effect.desc: Deals 6d6 damage to all targets and any target that remains at 1 HP is graated the Worthy enhancement, which has the following effects: * A Worthy chracter gains +2 bonus to all checks * A Worthy chracter has its speed increased by 2 * A Worthy character can use a held [Shard of Gungnir] as an [Instant] * Worthy removes the Unworthy enfeeblement

Orgin.desc: Two squares occupied by two separate enemy characters without Enmity

Marker Area.desc: A stationary 5x5 area centered on the origin

Target.desc: All enemies within the marker area

Marker Trigger.desc: The beginning of this character's next turn

Marker Effect.desc: Deals 4d6 damage and any target that takes 10 or more damage by this (after damage reduction) gains the Unworthy enfeeblement, which has the following effects: * An Unworthy character incurs a -2 penalty on all checks. * An Unworthy character has its speed reduced by 2. * An Unworthy character cannot wield a [Shard of Gungnir]. * Unworthy removes the Worthy enhancement. * Unworthy is removed when a character takes 10 or more damage from a single source, deals 10 or more damage in a single attack, or hals 10 or more HP in a single ability

Marker Area.desc: A mobile 1x1 marker centered on one enemy with Enmity or the highest amount of Hit Points

Target.desc: All enemies within the marker area

Marker Trigger.desc: The beginning of this chracter's next turn

Marker Effect.desc: Deals 8d6 damage to the target and if the target remains a t or above 1 HP it grants the Worthy enhancement to them, which has the following effects: * A Worthy chracter gains +2 bonus to all checks * A Worthy chracter has its speed increased by 2 * A Worthy character can use a held [Shard of Gungnir] as an [Instant] * Worthy removes the Unworthy enfeeblement

effects.desc: An emanation of Odin's dark power, draining your very will

Target.desc: All enemies within the marker area

Marker Trigger.desc: The beginning of this character's next turn

Marker Effect.desc: Deals 3d6 damage to all targets and causes DOT(5)

Origin.desc: 3 non-adjacent points on one edge of the encounter map

Marker Area.desc: A stationary 1x16 area extending in a straight line from the origin

Target.desc: All enemies within the marker area

Marker Trigger.desc: The beginning of this character's next turn

Marker Effect.desc: Deals 8d6 damage to all target and any taget that take 10 or more damage by this (after damage reduction) gain the Unworthy enfeeblement, which has the following effects: * An Unworthy character incurs a -2 penalty on all checks. * An Unworthy character has its speed reduced by 2. * An Unworthy character cannot wield a [Shard of Gungnir]. * Unworthy removes the Worthy enhancement. * Unworthy is removed when a character takes 10 or more damage from a single source, deals 10 or more damage in a single attack, or hals 10 or more HP in a single ability

Origin.desc: Two squares occupied by two separate enemy characters without enmity

Marker Area.desc: A mobile 5x5 area centered on the origin

Target.desc: All enemies within the marker area

Marker Trigger.desc: The beginning of this character's next turn

Marker Effect.desc: Deals 3d6 damage and summons a [Gungnir] in an unoccupied adjacent area to the center

Trait_0.name: Dreadful Tension
Trait_0.desc: This character does not take a turn, instead at the end of the [Adventurer Step] it deals 5 damage to all enemies and causes the Unworthy enfeeblement, which has the following effects: * An Unworthy character incurs a -2 penalty on all checks. * An Unworthy character has its speed reduced by 2. * An Unworthy character cannot wield a [Shard of Gungnir]. * Unworthy removes the Worthy enhancement. * Unworthy is removed when a character takes 10 or more damage from a single source, deals 10 or more damage in a single attack, or hals 10 or more HP in a single ability

Trait_1.name: Worthy Prize
Trait_1.desc: When a chracter reduces a [Gungnir] to 0 HP, they gain the Worthy enhancement, which has the following effects: * A Worthy chracter gains +2 bonus to all checks * A Worthy chracter has its speed increased by 2 * A Worthy character can use a held [Shard of Gungnir] as an [Instant] * Worthy removes the Unworthy enfeeblement

Trait_2.name: Elder Arm
Trait_2.desc: When this character is reduced to 0 HP, it is not removed from the battlefield. Instead inform the player that, "The Mighty Gungnir will be wielded by the Worthy." If they interact with the defeated [Gungir] using a Primary or Secondary Action they gain [Shard of Gungnir] and acces to the following [Duty Actions]. After a [Duty Action] is used tehy lose [Shard of Gungnir]. * Boon of Steel (Primary, Ranged 10) You divide 10 damage reduction among any nuber of allies in range until the start of the next [Adventurer Step]. * Heaven Piercer (Primary, Ranged 10) You deal 6d6+6 damage among any number of enemies in range. * To Valhalla (Primary, Ranged 10) You heal 4d6+4 hit points. divided among any number of allies within range.

Name_Component.name: Odin, Lord of the Eternal Hall

Trait_0.name: Elite Foe: Lord of the Corpse Hall
Trait_0.desc: This character cannot be Stunned and markers they have generated cannot be removed. Be sure to inform players of this before beginning the encounter.

Trait_1.name: Survive and Receive Valhalla
Trait_1.desc: Odin summons 2 [Gungnir] 3 spaces from themself at the start of each Round this Phase.

Target.desc: All enemies on the encounter map

Base Effect.desc: Odin remains stationary until the start of the 3rd round the deal 999 damage to all enemies
